nasb.text: So his fellow slave fell to the ground and began to plead with him, saying, ‘Have patience with me and I will repay you.’

esv.text: So his fellow servant fell down and pleaded with him, ‘Have patience with me, and I will pay you.’

cnv.text: 那和他一同作僕人的就跪下求他，說：‘請寬容我，我會還給你的。’

ccb.text: 同伴跪下哀求道，‘请宽容我，我会还你的。’

csbs.text: “这人就俯伏在地    央求他，说：‘请宽容我吧，我会还给你的。’
